landing.title: prevuiw
landing.heroSubtitle: Add our SDK to your site, share a review link, and your team can leave pinned comments directly on the live page. Like Figma comments, but for websites.
landing.oldWay2: Draw arrows in a markup tool
landing.oldWay3: Post in Slack with a paragraph of context
landing.newWay1: Add SDK to your site (one script tag)
landing.newWay2: Share the review link with your team
landing.newWay3: Everyone leaves feedback directly on the live site
landing.demoSubtitle: Your team reviews directly on the live site — no screenshots, no guessing.
landing.step1Desc: Add a single script tag to your site. Works with any framework — Next.js, Vite, static HTML.
landing.step2Desc: Create a version, get a review URL. Share it with your team — no account needed to review.
landing.step3Desc: Reviewers click anywhere on your live site to leave pinned comments. Real-time, in context.
landing.feature1Desc: Pin comments to exact elements with CSS selector tracking. Comments stay in place even when the page changes.
landing.feature2Desc: Review on mobile, tablet, laptop, or desktop. Comments are tracked separately per viewport.
landing.feature3Desc: See team cursors moving in real time. Comments appear instantly for everyone.
landing.feature4Desc: Every reviewed page is automatically captured. View past feedback with screenshots on the prevuiw dashboard.
landing.platformsSubtitle: Any site that can load a script tag works with prevuiw. Static sites, SPAs, server-rendered — it doesn't matter.
landing.platformsAnyUrl: Review URLs include invite tokens, so only your team can leave feedback. No random visitors will see the review UI.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Sign up, add the SDK, share the link. Your team can start leaving visual feedback immediately.

dashboard.title: My Projects
dashboard.noProjects: No projects yet. Create one to get started!

project.sdkStep1Title: 1. Add this SDK script to your site's <head>
project.sdkStep2Desc: Once deployed, create a version with your domain to start reviewing.
project.scriptTagDesc: Add this to your site's <head> to enable review mode.

version.shareUrl: Share this URL with your team to start reviewing:

review.screenshotHint: Screenshots are captured automatically when a reviewer leaves their first comment on a page. Share the review URL to get started.
